destination.reason: Biology Department's primary teaching & laboratory building. Across the actual Fall 2024 / Spring 2025 class schedules it hosts the most upper-division (300/400-level) BIOL meetings and, decisively, nearly every BIOL teaching lab (252L, 271L, 272L, 278L, 422L, 447L, 451L, 471L, 474L, 475L). Since the standard B.S. plan requires an organismal 400-level course plus four advanced electives with multiple labs, a junior/senior spends more class hours here than anywhere else.
